Managed AI receptionist and missed call recovery

Recover missed calls and turn more leads into booked appointments automatically.

VOXmatiON is a done-for-you AI communication system. We recover missed calls, qualify leads, follow up automatically, and book appointments directly into your calendar.

72-hour setup
30-day results guarantee
24/7 AI receptionist
Done for you

If VOXmatiON recovers only 2 to 3 missed jobs per month, it can already pay for itself.

Estimated revenue recovered$3,200

Built to recover revenue from calls you already receive

VOXmatiON turns missed calls, after-hours inquiries, and slow follow-up into qualified leads and booked appointments.

Missed Call Recovery

Instantly follows up with missed callers, captures intent, and alerts your team before the lead goes cold.

24/7 AI Receptionist

Answers routine calls, collects lead details, routes urgent requests, and keeps your business responsive after hours.

Appointment Booking

Qualifies prospects and moves them toward booked appointments using your preferred calendar and CRM workflow.

Custom Voice Flows

Built around your service categories, questions, locations, and follow-up rules so every call feels business-specific.

Live in days, not months

A managed setup process built for speed, low friction, and measurable lead recovery.

01

Map your missed call flow

We document your services, lead questions, routing logic, calendar rules, and follow-up expectations.

02

Connect phone, CRM, and calendar

VOXmatiON connects your call handling, lead capture, notifications, CRM, and booking workflow.

03

Launch within 72 hours

Your AI receptionist goes live, starts recovering missed calls, and sends qualified leads to your team.

04

Optimize from real conversations

We refine questions, scripts, lead scoring, and alerts based on actual caller behavior and conversion data.

Designed for high-intent service leads

Use VOXmatiON anywhere slow response time, missed calls, or no-shows create revenue leaks.

After-hours lead capture

Catch leads that arrive when your team is offline and respond before competitors do.

Learn more

High-intent missed calls

Recover customers who called with immediate need, pricing questions, or booking intent.

Learn more

Service business qualification

Capture service type, urgency, location, job value, and preferred appointment time automatically.

Learn more

No-show reduction

Send reminders and follow-up flows that reduce empty appointment slots and lost revenue.

Learn more
Pricing

One managed system, priced to pay for itself

VOXmatiON starts at $347/month. If it recovers only 2 to 3 extra jobs per month, it can already pay for itself.

Starter

For small service businesses that want 24/7 missed call recovery and lead capture without hiring extra staff.

$347/month
24/7 AI call answering
Missed call recovery
Automatic lead follow-up
Email and SMS notifications
CRM and calendar integration
No-show reduction workflows
Most recommended

Pro

For growing service businesses that want full AI reception, automatic booking, lead qualification, and no-show reduction.

$497/month
Everything in Starter
Full CRM integration
Calendar booking automation
No-show reduction workflows
Lead scoring and hot lead alerts
Priority onboarding and support

Elite

For clinics, law firms, and multi-location service teams that need custom workflows, dedicated support, and enterprise integrations.

Custom
Everything in Pro
Multi-location support
Custom AI call flows
Dedicated account manager
Priority 24/7 support
Custom reporting and analytics

30-day results guarantee: 3 recovered leads or appointments, or we extend free or refund your first month.

Founders offer, first 10 clients only

Get the Pro plan at $347/month with lifetime price lock

The first 10 businesses to join VOXmatiON get Pro-level AI reception, missed call recovery, appointment booking, and CRM integration at the Starter price, locked in forever.

  • ✓24/7 AI receptionist and missed call recovery
  • ✓Full CRM and calendar integration
  • ✓No-show reduction workflows
  • ✓Lead scoring and hot lead alerts
  • ✓Done-for-you setup within 72 hours
  • ✓30-day results guarantee
  • ✓Lifetime price lock at $347/month
In exchange for feedback, performance data, and a testimonial after 60 days.

No contracts. Cancel any time after 30 days.

FAQ

Common questions

Everything you need to know before getting started.

No. VOXmatiON is a managed AI communication system that answers inbound calls, recovers missed calls, qualifies leads, follows up automatically, and books appointments directly into your calendar. It works by voice, not just text chat.

Still have questions? Chat with a VOXmatiON specialist and calculate your missed call recovery opportunity in minutes.

Talk to our team or call us directly. We will help you calculate the missed call recovery opportunity for your business.
